query: Hvordan starter jeg en ny virksomhed i Danmark?
criteria: Response should reference virk.dk's 'Start virksomhed' launcher on the home page or the relevant /myndigheder/<type>/<agency>/selvbetjening/<slug>/ launcher pattern. Should mention this is a Erhvervsstyrelsen-run portal and that filing happens in the agency's own application after launching from virk.dk. Bonus if it mentions MitID Erhverv login is required for filing.

query: Find me the article on virk.dk about reporting workplace accidents
criteria: Response should query the GraphQL endpoint at https://virk.dk/graphql using artikelCollection (with where filter or search) or use /search/?term= URL. Should reference the 'Anmeld arbejdsulykke' launcher or relevant article. Acceptable to use the helper script (python3 virk_dk_api.py search-articles or article <slug>).

query: look up CVR 10103940
criteria: Response should use either http://distribution.virk.dk/cvr-permanent/virksomhed/_search Elasticsearch endpoint with HTTP Basic auth and term query on Vrvirksomhed.cvrNummer, OR datacvr.virk.dk/enhed/virksomhed/10103940. The helper script `python3 datacvr_api.py virksomhed 10103940` is also acceptable. Should note distribution endpoint retires end of 2026.

query: Get the list of all Danish ministries and their agencies via the GraphQL API
criteria: Response should POST to https://virk.dk/graphql with a query against ministeriumCollection containing items { navn cvr myndigheder { navn cvr } }. Should mention anonymous access is fine. Acceptable: `python3 virk_dk_api.py ministerier`.

query: Can I get my company's pending deadlines from Mit Virk via API?
criteria: Response must explain that mvFrist (and other Mit Virk types like MVSag, MVBesked, MVTilladelse) are session-bound to MitID Erhverv login, with NO public API or service-account access. Should note /mit-virk/ is in robots.txt and that there is no anonymous path to personal-business data.

query: GraphQL introspection on virk.dk
criteria: Response should clearly state introspection is DISABLED — __schema returns errors. Should mention type discovery comes from SPA bundle inspection or trial-and-error using <type>Collection { items { __typename } }. Endpoint is https://virk.dk/graphql.

query: search for companies named carlsberg
criteria: Response should use distribution.virk.dk Elasticsearch (cvr-permanent/virksomhed/_search) with a query on Vrvirksomhed.virksomhedMetadata.nyesteNavn.navn, or use datacvr.virk.dk free-text search with ?soeg=. HTTP Basic auth required for ES. The `python3 datacvr_api.py search "carlsberg"` helper is acceptable.

query: Hvor finder jeg vejledning om byggetilladelser?
criteria: Response should drill into /emner/Byggeri/ theme on virk.dk or query GraphQL artikelCollection filtered by relevant slug/tags. May reference /vejledning/ for general guidance. Should mention sub-themes pattern /emner/<theme>/<sub-theme>/.

query: I need the English version of virk.dk content
criteria: Response should mention the sister site businessindenmark.virk.dk as the English mirror, and note it is curated/subset (many articles only exist in Danish).

query: How do I resolve a vanity URL like /start on virk.dk?
criteria: Response should use the redirectQuery GraphQL operation with realm="virk", returning redirectUrl and httpStatus. Empty string + httpStatus -1 means no match. Helper: `python3 virk_dk_api.py redirect <url>`.

query: Get all articles tagged with 'moms'
criteria: Response should POST to https://virk.dk/graphql querying artikelCollection with a where filter on tags (artikelCollection has fields sys.id, slug, overskrift, tags). Total ~908 articles. Pagination via limit/skip is appropriate.

query: list every Danish kommune with their CVR number
criteria: Response should query GraphQL myndighedCollection filtered by type='kommune' (myndighedCollection has 169 entries with forkortelse, type, cvr, beskrivelse). Should note that navn/slug live on the linked Ministerium, not on Myndighed itself. Helper: `python3 virk_dk_api.py myndigheder --type kommune`.

query: fetch the Danish i18n strings for the mit-virk-overblik resource set
criteria: Response should query ressourceSetCollection on GraphQL with where { slug: "..." } and locale="da", expanding ressourcerCollection items { key value }. Helper: `python3 virk_dk_api.py ressourceset <slug> --locale da`.

query: How many self-service launchers exist on virk.dk and how do I enumerate them?
criteria: Response should mention udstillerCollection (8316 entries) on the GraphQL endpoint as the way to enumerate self-service entry points, since the sitemap omits /myndigheder/<...>/selvbetjening/<...>/ URLs. Alternative: walk the agency tree at /myndigheder/.

query: Can I bulk download every Danish company record from CVR?
criteria: Response should mention distribution.virk.dk pagination limit (from+size <= 3000), the scroll API (?scroll=1m) for larger sets, and /datakatalog/ daily ndjson dumps for true bulk export. Should warn about the end-of-2026 phase-out and migration to Datafordeler (https://datafordeler.dk).

query: What's the difference between datacvr.virk.dk and distribution.virk.dk?
criteria: Response should explain: datacvr.virk.dk is the human-facing React SPA behind Cloudflare Turnstile (anonymous, returns 403 to headless), while distribution.virk.dk is the system-to-system Elasticsearch v6 endpoint requiring HTTP Basic auth (free creds via cvrselvbetjening@erst.dk). Both serve CVR data administered by Erhvervsstyrelsen.

query: look up production unit 1003393495
criteria: Response should query distribution.virk.dk/cvr-permanent/produktionsenhed/_search with a term on VrproduktionsEnhed.pNummer, requiring HTTP Basic auth. Or visit datacvr.virk.dk/enhed/produktionsenhed/1003393495. Helper: `python3 datacvr_api.py p-enhed 1003393495`.

query: how do I hide an item from my Mit Virk dashboard programmatically?
criteria: Response should reference the mvSkjulInformation GraphQL mutation with arguments service, uuid, identitetType, skjul. Must note this requires a session-bound MitID Erhverv login — not possible with service account.

query: Are there REST API endpoints on virk.dk?
criteria: Response must clearly state NO — there are no REST /api/* routes (all return 404). The single anonymous endpoint is GraphQL at https://virk.dk/graphql. Should mention CORS is wide open and introspection is disabled.

query: show me the Mit Virk page tree structure
criteria: Response should query mitVirkSideCollection on GraphQL (small collection) with nested mitVirkSiderCollection items having overskrift and slug, optionally filtered by where { slug }. Anonymous access works for this editorial structure (the tree itself, not user data).
